repair_memory_selection.selection_rationale: d6e3247f (ca6k_00257) matches the CPack error + returncode 2 and kernel type casting error (assigning float to unsigned int). 41508067 (log_softmax) shares the same CPack symptom and directly covers the 'no member named' error in AscendC namespace. 080605b7 (swish) is another instance of a missing AscendC namespace member. 77c4bf94 (triplet_margin_loss) addresses integer-to-float casting in kernels, relevant to the GlobalTensor-to-float assignment error. 998eba39 (relu) provides a pattern for correct AscendC function usage to avoid type mismatch errors.
